description: Fix gao extraction files' source path references. All 9 files in theory/raw/gao/extracted/ have '来源文档' fields pointing to the old path prefix '高派命理理论知识库/' which doesn't exist in the current repo. The correct path is 'sources/gao/'. This ensures the traceability chain from extraction files back to actual source documents is correct within this repository.
steps: In each of the 9 files in theory/raw/gao/extracted/, find the '来源文档' line at the top and replace the path prefix '高派命理理论知识库/' with 'sources/gao/'

The 9 files are: 高派_命宫长生诀择日篇_候选规律提取_2026-05-19.md, 高派_大运流年篇_候选规律提取_2026-05-19.md, 高派_理法篇_候选规律提取_2026-05-19.md, 高派_神煞应用宝典_候选规律提取_2026-05-19.md, 高派_神煞篇_候选规律提取_2026-05-19.md, 高派_象法篇_候选规律提取_2026-05-19.md, 高派_财运事业断法_候选规律提取_2026-05-19.md, 高派_财运篇_候选规律提取_2026-05-19.md, 高派_车祸婚姻篇_候选规律提取_2026-05-19.md
For the 车祸婚姻篇 file, it references two source files: both should be updated to use 'sources/gao/' prefix
Verify all updated paths now point to files that actually exist in the repo
acceptance_criteria: All 9 gao extraction files have '来源文档' fields pointing to 'sources/gao/filename.md' instead of '高派命理理论知识库/filename.md'
Every referenced file path in '来源文档' fields exists in the repo (can be verified with ls)
verification: Run: grep '来源文档' theory/raw/gao/extracted/*.md -- should show 'sources/gao/' prefix in all entries
Run: grep -o 'sources/gao/[^`]*' theory/raw/gao/extracted/*.md | while read f; do test -f "$f" && echo OK || echo MISSING: $f; done
findings: All 9 files updated successfully. All 10 referenced source files (including both from the 车祸婚姻篇 file) verified to exist at their new paths. No old '高派命理理论知识库/' references remain in the extracted files.
